texto: This time, there are no tears. This time, there is only emptiness and I feel it set in the straight line of my mouth. I am not strong enough for this. I want an earthquake, a hurricane, anything - even a devil, the one with the cloven hoof - Mrs. Leed's unfortunate 13th child - to rush out and stomp on me, break me into little pieces and hurl me to the stars, let me go back with those people I love. Please.
explicacao: Citação de Kathleen DeMarco sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “This time, there are no tears. This time, there is only emptiness and I feel it set in the straig…” articula familia, grief, loss em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como luto e loss.
